creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #11)
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy22/data/140amd64-default-foo/2024-05-08_19h38m32s/logs/errors/mysqltcl-3.052_2.log

./generic/mysqltcl.c:914:7: error: use of undeclared identifier 'bool'

      ^
Look like isn't related.
Added maintainer tcltk@ to CC.
